secondary_palette: cobalt blue, teal/forest green, pale lavender
composition_vocabulary: Centered, high-contrast product shots against dark or neutral grounds dominate; punctuated by flat bold illustration, hand-drawn technical sketches, and a single editorial street-style image. No unified layout language — each tile reads as a discrete creative reference pulled from different visual worlds.
lighting_quality: Predominantly controlled studio or dramatic dark-ground lighting on objects; flat even light on illustrations and sketches; a small number of ambient daylight references.
material_textures: sculptural matte resin, patent/wet-look leather, cotton fleece, parchment/aged paper, smooth ceramic-like polymer, organic biomorphic forms
aesthetic_register: Contemporary art-school meets underground streetwear: the board orbits independent fashion-object design and DIY brand identity rather than traditional luxury, with occult/symbolic iconography as the connective tissue.
notably_absent: Precious metals, gemstones, ring-on-finger close-ups, velvet display trays, and the delicate editorial jewellery photography that typically defines a luxury-jewellery moodboard are entirely absent.
